CreateMountingTarget.fsId: ID of the FileSystem for which the MountTarget is to be created
CreateMountingTarget.subnetId: Subnet of the MountTarget; must belong to the VPC of the filesystem, specified as a short ID
CreateMountingTarget.vpcId: Short ID of the VPC that owns the filesystem instance VIP
CreateMountingTarget.accessGroupName: Name of the bound permission group; 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, hyphens, underscores, and dots
CreateMountingTarget.address: Specified IP address for creating the MountTarget
